title: NCHM JEE Apply Online

detail.short_info: National Testing Agency (NTA) has conducting NCHM JEE 2025. Candidates with 10+2 can apply online.

content.text: Name of the Post: NCHM JEE 2025 Online Form

Brief Information: National Testing Agency (NTA) has given a notification for conducting the National Council for Hotel Management Joint Entrance Examination (NCHM JEE-2025) for admission to the B.Sc. (Hospitality & Hotel Administration) Course at the Institutes of Hotel Management (IHM) affiliated to the National Council for Hotel Management and Catering Technology (NCHM&CT) for the Academic Year 2025-26. Those Candidates who are interested & completed all eligibility criteria can read the Notification & Apply Online.

items.label: Application Fee
items.text: For General (UR) / OBC-(NCL) as per Central List: Rs. 1000/- For Gen-EWS Candidates: Rs. 700/- For Scheduled Caste (SC) / Scheduled Tribes (ST) / PwD / Third Gender: Rs. 450/- Payment Mode: Payment Gateway through Credit Card / Debit Card (except Master/Visa Card)/ Net Banking/UPI/Wallet

items.label: Important Dates
items.text: Starting Date for Apply Online & Payment Fee: 16-12-2024 Last Date to Apply Online: 15-02-2025 upto 05:00 PM Last date for successful transaction of Examination fee: 15-02-2025 upto 11:50 PM Correction in the Particulars of Application Form Online only: 17-02-2025 to 20-02-2025 Date for Downloading of Admit Card by the Candidate from NTA Website: To be announced on the Website Date of Exam: 27-04-2025 (Sunday) Mode of Exam: Computer Based Test (CBT) Duration of Examination: 180 minutes (03 hours) Timing of Examination: 09.00 am to 12.00 pm Exam Centre, Date and Shift: As indicated on the Admit Card Date for Display of Recorded Responses and Provisional Answer Keys on the Website for inviting challenge(s) from Interested candidates: To be announced later on website Date for Declaration of Result on NTA website: To be announced later on website

items.label: Age Limit
items.text: There is no age restriction for appearing in NCHM JEE as per the New Education Policy.

seo_tags: NCHM JEE 2025 - Apply Online for National Council for Hotel Management Joint Entrance Exam
